params.prompt: Vertical 9:16 premium science explainer source plate, one flying snake in midair above rainforest canopy, seen from slightly below so the flattened body is obvious, the snake forms a broad S curve while gliding, tree trunks far to both sides, no wings, no legs, no branch touching the snake, no extra snakes, natural realistic scales, cinematic daylight, mobile-readable silhouette with clear negative space, no text, no logo, no watermark, no UI.
